nostr
Platforms Privacy GitHub
lock Private messaging on Nostr

Nostr Chat

Encrypted DMs, groups, and contact requests. Relay control for private messaging.

download Choose a build code View source
Run it your way

One chat app, every desk and pocket

Nostr Chat can be used from a browser, packaged as a standalone desktop app for macOS, Windows, or Linux, and shipped to Android users as an APK.

language

Browser

Open it on desktop or mobile browsers with responsive layouts for chat lists and conversations.

desktop_windows

Desktop

Build Electron packages for macOS, Windows, and Linux when you want a standalone app.

android

Android APK

Ship Android debug or release APKs from the same codebase using the project build scripts.

hub

Nostr-native

Bring your Nostr identity, choose relays, and keep the network layer visible when it matters.

Private by protocol

Built around Nostr specs instead of a company account

The app uses Nostr login, encrypted private-message flows, relay metadata, relay lists, private app storage, and profile records so chats stay portable across the protocol.

key Account control

Create a fresh Nostr account, use a NIP-07 signer, or log in with your own key.

mark_chat_unread Direct messages

Search threads, react, delete messages, track unread chats, and inspect relay delivery.

groups Group conversations

Create groups, handle invitations, and keep membership data private to the app.

settings_input_antenna Relay choice

Manage app relays, published relay lists, discovered contact relays, and connection state.

Messaging workflow

The controls chat users expect

Review first-contact requests

Accept, block, delete, or inspect new requests before they enter your main chats.

Manage people and profile

Keep contacts, profile publishing, identifier lookup, and preferences in one place.

See what the network is doing

Check sync history, notification settings, relay diagnostics, and connection state.

Build Nostr Chat from the source repo

The project includes web, Electron, and Android build scripts, plus developer notes for Nostr specs, testing, and packaging.

open_in_new Open repository
nostr

Made by LNbits for people who want private chat on open protocols.
